insight.summary: detect-secrets flags realistic Google-style IDs as Base64 High Entropy Strings
insight.detail: Google API IDs (spreadsheet IDs, file IDs) are long base64-like strings that trigger `detect-secrets`'s Base64HighEntropyString detector. This blocks commits containing realistic testdata JSON fixtures. Using `pragma: allowlist secret` per-line is possible but noisy across many fixtures.
insight.action: Use simple placeholder IDs (e.g. `spreadsheet-id-001`, `file-001`) in test fixtures instead of realistic-looking Google-style IDs to avoid false positives from detect-secrets.
